user_query: Add a task to the 'Garage Repair' project called 'Fix the leaky faucet'.

fields.title: Fix the leaky faucet
fields.description: Inspect and repair the leaky faucet in the garage; replace washers or the faucet as needed to stop the leak.

result.reasoning: User requested adding a task to the 'Garage Repair' project. The operation's node type 'POI' does not match known schema, so created a Task instead and appended it to the Garage Repair project.
